name: MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard
welcome_bonus_conditions: after spending $2,000 in the first 90 days and signing up for paperless e-statements
rewards_description: Redemptions are available for airfare, hotel, cruise and car rentals.
pros: Up to 30,000 bonus points.
Up to 5 points per $1 spent on purchases.

cons: High income requirements of either $80,000 personal or $150,000 household.
